nl_query: For each student who filed a revaluation request that was approved, show their name, original final marks, revaluation attempt total marks, the absolute difference, and whether the difference exceeds the board's configured deviation threshold.
failed_sql:
SELECT sc.name AS student_name, am.final_marks AS original_final_marks, ea_r.total_marks AS revaluation_total_marks, ABS(am.final_marks - ea_r.total_marks) AS difference, ep.deviation_threshold, CASE WHEN ABS(am.final_marks - ea_r.total_marks) > ep.deviation_threshold THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS exceeds_threshold
FROM   revaluation_request rr
JOIN   answer_script       a  ON a.id  = rr.script_id
JOIN   student_cache       sc ON sc.student_id = a.student_id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt  ea_r ON ea_r.id = rr.resulting_attempt_id
JOIN   answer_script      am ON am.id           = ea_r.script_id
JOIN   board              b   ON b.id           = ea_r.board_id
CROSS  JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT ep2.deviation_threshold, ep2.review_required, ep2.third_eval_trigger
  FROM   evaluation_policy ep2
  WHERE  (ep2.board_id = ea_r.board_id)
     OR  (ep2.course_id = b.course_id AND ep2.board_id IS NULL)
     OR  (ep2.course_id IS NULL AND ep2.board_id IS NULL)
  ORDER  BY CASE WHEN ep2.board_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
                 WHEN ep2.course_id IS NOT NULL THEN 2
                 ELSE 3 END
  LIMIT  1
) ep
WHERE  rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
  AND  ea_r.attempt_type = 'REVAL'
  AND  ea_r.status IN ('FROZEN','SUBMITTED')
  AND  ea_r.is_active    = TRUE
ORDER  BY student_name ASC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): evaluation_marks.final_marks, evaluation_marks.final_marks, evaluation_marks.final_marks. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
